title: logania recurva
intro: Logania recurva is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Loganiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion. The health benefits of Logania recurva include its potential to treat conditions such as diarrhea and dyspepsia, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. Logania recurva is traditionally prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, often in the form of a tea or liquid extract.
